name: Chilling Kiss
outcome: [AttackerName]'s surprisingly nimble tongue deeply entangles with [TargetName]'s, making [TargetHimOrHer] shiver in pleasure as [AttackerHeOrShe] almost seems to soak in [TargetHisOrHer] warmth through [TargetHisOrHer] mouth.
miss: [AttackerName] tries to deeply entangle [TargetName] into a kiss with [AttackerHisOrHer] surprisingly nimble tongue, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to ignore the pleasant sensations and pushes [AttackerName]'s tongue back into [AttackerHisOrHer] mouth.
statusOutcome: [AttackerName] gently nibbles on [TargetName]'s tongue as [AttackerHeOrShe] kisses [TargetHimOrHer], making [TargetName] shiver with pleasure as an aphrodisiac begins to tingle through [TargetHisOrHer] mouth.
